reviews.review_description: who is having a lot of fun but then i kept having to redo this one pottery or i don't know if i had to keep doing it or if i kept messing it up and it won't let me ship stuff i think my game either is broken what i'm just doing something wrong like i said i keep having to do the same thing over and over again and it won't let me ship it so please fix the kane if it's not like this for other people i think my game is just broken what i recommend it eh

I love making pot in this game (I have the same one on tablet but vr is more fun) but the only issue I have is when trying to put a design on the pot I have to hold the button otherwise it won't put it on and the hands spaz out when waiting a couple seconds for anything (kiln or auction)
Update. Would be a lot better if there was more primary colors like red and orange. Would also be nice if designs were cheaper to buy
I’ve been having fun with this game, but is there a way to change the color of basic patterns? If there is, I can’t find it. If there’s not, pleeeease add it.

Saw this today and downloaded it. Been there for hours. What I would like to see is this: 1. Have a clear start button in the beginning. For whatever reason, I didn't figure it out till 10 min. later (may have been me...) 2. Connect a Youtube Screen so I can watch TV and make pottery. 3. This is a GREAT opportunity for Multiplayer AND a Discord server to be created. Sharing the pictures on Discord would be cool. I know about the apps but I do not think this connects there - a miss for sure.  Overall good relaxing game. You can't make just one, always looking for the one that's gonna "pop" so to speak haha. Hope this helps. On Discord: Virgounitis.

Really  brings out  creativity. Like chips, you  can't stop at just one.  As soon as I finish one vase and sold it, can't wait to 
start another. Very  addictive and fun!
This was very difficult to navigate especially when they only let you use one controller can’t even use your real hands to shape pot didn’t like this at all.

reviews.review_title: Does  NOT export and save Files
reviews.review_description: This is great app with a lot of potential. I wish i did not have to auction everything and sell. These has to way to export and save file for 3D printing.

Very fun and allows lots of creativity, as well as being easy to understand. There are many colors and details you can add to personalize it. I like how even during a commission you can still do what you like instead of always focusing on what is asked for by the game.
While it's calming and fun, I do have a few notes. I think that you should be able to change the color of some of the patterns. Most of them have transparent spots so you can paint under them, but some of them already have a set color which rarely matches with the rest of the design.
I also think that there should be a way to view your past designs. I have checked, but I don't think there is a way. I can still just take screenshots, but I would much rather be able to see them through the game.
I often accidentally press a color or pattern in the store and it immediately buys it. I think that they should add something to confirm your purchase to prevent this.

reviews.review_title: LOVE IT! Then I hated it.
reviews.review_description:
I love this game. It’s fun and easy. I use it to stay calm as I suffer from severe chronic pain. I just wish that it had a gallery where it saved pictures of all the pottery you make. Hopefully the developers actually read the reviews and take suggestions like this into consideration.

Update: It is impossible to get more than 2 stars on the watch tower one because 1.) there is no way to make the bricks look like the photo, 2.) there is no way to get the bottom part to look like the photo, and 3.) there aren’t dots that small anywhere in the shop. Please fix this issue and I will bring my rating back to 5 stars.

UPDATE: Now I have to lower to 1 star because the developers disabled the ability to take photos in the app and I need to be able to take photos to show problems. Like the jewels being messed up. Two will be normal while the other two are missing either the silver outline or the jewel itself.

developer_response.body: Hello! Thank you for your detailed feedback. Also, we are deeply sorry about the inconvenience. Please contact us at support@idreams.pl. We will investigate the source of all the listed issues.

reviews.review_description: There must be something wrong with this game. I have not been able to do anything except sculpt. I can't move the pottery to the kiln. I don't know if I'm doing anything wrong but it's not very intuitive if that is the case. Hoping someone can reach out to me to reset the game if there is something wrong with it.

Tbh I rarely write reviews but this game is insanely addicting and I've never done pottery in my life. I think what would be a great idea is to somehow implement a feature of exporting created vases as 3D projects for printing or other uses. The game has great graphics and slick UI, I can definitely see it going far with some additional mechanics like changing colors of patterns or even hand-tracking.
Well ya was for shiggles but honestly it’s really relaxing. Only thing I would love is using 2hands , not gonna lie. I understand choosing clay and etc but what do I know lol
But please devs can we be able to use two hands instead to make it easier to make the pottery? and add more environments maybe to choose from, a house will be nice etc.

Like all the other reviews, I surprisingly enjoyed this app and played it for longer than I expected! I’m sure there will be more updates coming soon but please add two hands features and more rooms we can purchase to create and place pot s for great presentation.
... accessories and some patterns don't work. I'm trying to complete a Chinese vase but the patterns are faint when applied so I am unable to  complete the order..
I’ve watched videos trying to figure out to play this and it turns out I’m missing significant pieces of the game!  Apparently not ready for prime time.

developer_response.body: Hello! Could you give us more details about your issue at support@idreams.pl? We are happy to help!

reviews.review_description: Love this game;  so relaxing and creative. Out of all of my apps on my device I always play this first.  Definitely recommended.

I can't even complete the first contract because the vase won't go into the box. Ive tried 4 times. Remaking each one and still nothing. It can go to the auction block for 6 dollars all day long but not in the box to complete the goal. Because of this I can't progress any further. Even upon rebooting the app.  This is almost identical to the android game pottery, which was a ton of fun, this could be too except for this bug.This bug kind of ruins the game for me...  Seems like a waste of money now.

Would love to be able to skip this order.  I’ve tried it so many times I’ve lost count. It looks exactly like the picture so I don’t know what I’m doing wrong.  Please help.  Apart from that I love this game but very frustrating at the moment.

Lobe this game however it is a little glitchy. Accessories don't work correctly. Whenever I try to add the gems, half of them disappear only leaving the frame of the gem. Other ornaments are glitch too. Also is there a system to the auctions and how much they pay or is it random? Like should I only use one category of pattern per piece?
